Call it hunger. Call it heart. Whatever you call it, itвҖҷs the force that will not relent. The thing inside you that refuses to be defeated no matter what life puts in front of it. вқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”Ҙ

ThatвҖҷs the whole game.

Congratulations to our @fountainlife team on the grand opening of our Houston location!

This week we celebrated our fifth Fountain Life Longevity Center вҖ” and second in Texas вҖ” alongside our co-founders Peter Diamandis, Dr. William Kapp, and Dr. Robert Hariri, surrounded by some of HoustonвҖҷs top leaders in business, wellness, and innovation.

We built Fountain Life because most people wait until itвҖҷs too late to take control of their health. Now Houston has access to the worldвҖҷs most advanced AI-guided diagnostics, personalized longevity care, and proactive health optimization, and the tools to detect things when theyвҖҷre small and handle them now.

A person with health has a million dreams. A person without it has one.

Dallas. New York. Orlando. Naples. Houston. And with exciting conversations underway in Dubai, our mission to bring this to the world is just getting started. рҹҷҢрҹҢұрҹ’ҷ

NINE LITTLE INDIANS is Shannon KringвҖҷs wrenching and vital documentary that tells the story of the Charbonneau sisterвҖҷs decades-long fight for acknowledgement, justice, and healing after the abuses they suffered in the American Indian boarding school system. 

Tickets to the world premiere are on sale now. рҹ”— Link in bio.

Our CEO, co-founders, and VIP guests gathered to mark a milestone: Houston's newest destination for award-winning AI-Guided Diagnostics, personalized longevity care, and proactive health optimization is officially here.

HereвҖҷs a glimpse of what happened last night. Now itвҖҷs your opportunity to become a Member today. Explore at the link in bio.

The tools have changedвҖҰ from packed rooms and VHS tapes to global livestreams and now, AI.

But the purpose stays the same. To empower, to serve, to create impact that lasts.

Everyone can feel the shift happening.

The world is changing fast, and deep down, most people know they need to understand AI.

But instead of clarity, theyвҖҷre met with noise.
Too many tools.
Too many opinions.
Too much confusion about where to start and what actually matters.

ThatвҖҷs why weвҖҷre here.

Not to add more overwhelm.
To simplify it.
To show you what works.
To help you use AI in a way that saves time, creates leverage, and keeps your humanity at the center of it all.

Because this isnвҖҷt about becoming more robotic. ItвҖҷs about becoming more effective, more creative, and more free.

Join us for The AI Advantage Summit. Free to attend. Powerful to experience.

Comment LEVERAGE and weвҖҷll send you the link.

Behind every decision youвҖҷve ever made is one of the 6 human needs.

рҹ‘ү Comment вҖңQUIZвҖқ to discover your top human need.

1: Certainty
2: Uncertainty/Variety
3: Significance
4: Connection/Love
5: Growth
6: Contribution

We all share them, but the ones we choose to prioritize and how we meet them explain everything about the patterns that are either helping us or keeping us stuck.

Knowing which needs are running your behavior, and whether the way youвҖҷre meeting them is actually serving you, is some of the most valuable insight you can have.

рҹ‘ү Comment вҖңQUIZвҖқ and IвҖҷll send you a quick exercise to identify your top human need.

Podcast: @thediaryofaceopodcast

Winter is always followed by Spring! A reminder that life is always reaching toward growth, new life, and rebirth.

No matter what season youвҖҷve been navigating, darkness is never the end. 

Our suffering can lead us to something deeply meaningful. 

We can let go. And we can be renewed. 

Today our family is celebrating Easter and filled with gladness!

To everyone celebrating Easter, Passover, Ramadan, or simply welcoming the beauty of spring with open arms, weвҖҷre sending love and enormous gratitude for this incredible community. рҹҢ·рҹҷҸрҹ’ң

Yesterday, our family sat on the couch, glued to the TV, brimming with anticipation as the countdown clock ticked 3вҖҰ 2вҖҰ 1вҖҰ 

And thenвҖҰ LIFTOFF! рҹҢҺ рҹҳ®рҹҡҖ

What is it about a space launch that gives us all collective goosebumps?

As we watched that extraordinary rocket, @nasaвҖҷs Artemis II, pierce the sky, we ran outside together, tears in our eyes, waving and cheering on these heroes as they began their 10-day, 250,000-mile journey around the Moon.

For the first time in more 50 years, humanity is returning to the Moon, not just to visit, but to circle it, together, in shared wonder.

Just before lift-off, the crew was asked if they were ready рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҡҖрҹҮЁрҹҮҰ

вҖңWe are going for our families.вҖқ
вҖңWe are going for our teammates.вҖқ
вҖңWe are going for ALL HUMANITY.вҖқ

ThatвҖҷs what got me.

A courageous group of humans, some representing historic firsts, choosing to do something extraordinary not for themselves, but for all of us.

Watching this with our daughterвҖҰ pure awe.

THIS IS HUMANITY AT ITS BEST.

Bold. 
Innovative. 
United. 
Driven by something greater than ourselves.

To Reid, Victor, Christina, and Jeremy, God bless you! 

What did you feel watching the launch? WeвҖҷd love to hear!

If you donвҖҷt prime yourself, something else will.

Priming is one of the most powerful tools for clearing mental clutter and reclaiming your focus. ItвҖҷs about bridging the gap between where you are and where you want to be, by aligning with the version of yourself that already knows how to get there.

рҹ‘ү Comment вҖңPRIMEвҖқ and IвҖҷll DM you my priming exercise so you can experience the shift in your thoughts and emotions for yourself.

Breastfeeding. Releasing new music. Showing up. All at the same time.
